title: Certifying Australia芒鈧劉s Renewable Hydrogen Future Hits GO
content: Renewable hydrogen certification is a step closer to reality with consultation now open on the rules that will support the Guarantee of Origin (GO Scheme) rollout later this year. A cornerstone of the Albanese Government芒鈧劉s Future Made in Australia plan, the GO Scheme is an emissions accounting system that will certify the detailed provenance of low-emission products and renewable electricity.
author: Analysts Account
source: Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water Australia
